title: createAsyncThunk
description: The blessed pattern for async logic.

options: pending / fulfilled / rejected actions around your async fn
questions.explanation: Handle them in extraReducers to update state.

questions.prompt: Access these actions in a slice:
questions.explanation: extraReducers is for actions NOT defined by the slice itself.

options: Return a value (fulfilled) OR throw / rejectWithValue (rejected)
questions.explanation: rejectWithValue lets you attach a payload to the rejection.
